tool_args.label: Flag Repairs Definition
tool_args.raw_text: Flag repairs are a combination of replacing deteriorated components of the existing LRR Infrastructure. These repairs include bridge seats, abutments, girders, beams, bearings, bracing members, wingwalls, etc.

payload.claim_text: Flag repairs are a combination of replacing deteriorated components of the existing LRR Infrastructure. These repairs include bridge seats, abutments, girders, beams, bearings, bracing members, wingwalls, etc.
payload.subject: flag repairs
payload.description: Definition of flag repairs as used in the LIRR Maintenance of Way report
